faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Stapleton homes?
faqs.answer: Stapleton residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, carpenter ants, and odorous house ants. Pavement ants nest in cracks along sidewalks and foundations, carpenter ants target older wooden structures common in the area, and odorous house ants invade kitchens searching for food. Our technicians identify the species and apply targeted treatments for complete elimination.

Our team understands that ant infestations require prompt attention, especially in multi-family buildings and historic homes. We'll schedule a convenient appointment, assess your situation, and begin treatment immediately to stop the infestation from spreading.

faqs.question: Is your ant control treatment safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and pet-safe ant control methods that are highly effective yet safe for your family. Our technicians apply treatments strategically in areas where ants enter and nest while minimizing exposure to living spaces. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions during and after treatment.
